summary: Applied the dedicated backup VM live, created the PBS datastore, and verified the host backup target and nightly job.

verification.observed: backup-lv3 ran Proxmox Backup Server with datastore proxmox mounted on the dedicated backup disk.
The Proxmox host used PBS storage lv3-backup-pbs pointing to 10.10.10.60:8007.

notes: This receipt was backfilled from repository history and the current recorded platform state.
The platform still records platform_version 0.19.0 because the merged mainline re-apply has not been cut as a separate version milestone.
